description: Sanctuary MCP - Journal, sanctuary degree assessment, system state declaration

sanctuary.description: Sanctuary - Journal entries, 6-dimension scoring, system state

sanctuary_journal.description: Create a journal entry (opening/closing) with 6-dimension sanctuary scores. Saves as CartON concept.
sanctuary_journal.signature: sanctuary_journal(entry_text: str, entry_type: str, engagement: int, emotion: int, mechanics: int, progression: int, immersion: int, agency: int, user_explicitly_authorized: bool = false) -> str

sanctuary_assess.description: Calculate composite sanctuary degree from 6 dimensions: Engagement, Emotion, Mechanics, Progression, Immersion, Agency (each 1-10)
sanctuary_assess.signature: sanctuary_assess(engagement: int, emotion: int, mechanics: int, progression: int, immersion: int, agency: int) -> str

sanctuary_history.description: View sanctuary degree history and trends (placeholder - to be implemented)

sanctuary_state.description: Declare current system state: Wasteland or Sanctuary (placeholder - to be implemented)
